subject: pinctrl: baytrail: Fix potential NULL pointer dereference

features.post_operation: NULL check on returned pointer (if (!ptr) return -ENOMEM)
features.path_conditions: After devm_kcalloc returns, caller must check for NULL before using the pointer (especially before passing to suspend/resume callbacks).
features.fit_test_reasoning: Allocator (devm_kcalloc) returns a pointer that may be NULL; the required post-operation is a NULL check on the returned pointer before use. Missing the check leads to NULL pointer dereference. This fits the resource/post-op pattern adapted as missing-check.
